titleStmt.title: SII 26.351: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 351. (A.R. No. 332 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gobbūri Ōbarājayadēva-mahārāśayyaṉ: Śaka. 1532, Sādhāraṇa, Mārgaḻi 1, Friday = 1610 A.D., November 30.

summary.p: This inscription records the assignment of providing for special daily worship connected with the special festival of Tiruppaḷḷiyeḻuchchi during the month of Mārgaḻi, of tha god Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiyār. The assignment was made by Kāñchī [. .]ppa-mudaliyār, the agent and the pārapattiyam of the ruler, Guruvappar of Muḍippura-Uppalappāḍi, Venkiṭṭappar of Kaḍaikkūṭṭu-Veṇumpākkam, Tiyagapiḷḷai of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr and the ūravar (local residents) of Kūvam. It is stated that the rate for a day was probably 4 paṇam. The allotment of days is given as follows: Tānattār I day; Madirāntaka Viḻupparaiyar Araśar and others 6 days; Udayādittadēvar and others 4 days; Veṅgiyār and others 3 days; Toṇḍaimāns 3 days; Iruṅgaṇūr-kiḻavar 4 days; Kumāra [. .] 4 days; Kaikōḷas 1 day, Kāval Perumāḷ-ṉāyakkar 1 day; Ūrkkaṇakku (village accountant) 1 day; and ūṟp-podu (the local villagers) 2 days.

It is stated that this system should continue hereditarily by the families of the above-mentioned groups and the decision was taken to this effect in front of the shrine of the god of Tirukōvil-īśvaraṉ.
The Birmārāyar Tiruppichcharār-ṉāyiṉaṉ was the signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vicaiyāṟputaiya cālivāhaṉa cakāttam 1000 5 100 3 10 2 ṟ cellāniṉṟa cātāraṇa varuṣam mārkaḻi mātam mu 2 cukkiravāra ṉāḷ śrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭelecuvara koppūri Oparācayateva mahārācayyaṉ Avarkaḷ kāryattukku karttarāṉa pārapattiyam kāñci ppa mutaliyārum muṭippura Uppulappāṭi kuruvapparum kaṭaikkūṭṭu veṇum pākka veṅkiṭṭapparum tiruvoṟṟiyūr tiyākappiḷḷaiyum kūvam Ūravarum Uṭaiyār tiruviṟkolamuṭai
ppaḷḷiyeḻucci ciṟappukku kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa viparam ṉāḷ 1 kku ciṟappu 1kku 14 Āka paṇṭāra ciṟappu .§ tāṉattār ciṟappu 1 . matirān=taka viḻupparaiyar Aracar Uḷḷiṭ ṭār 6 . Utayātittatevar Uḷḷiṭṭār 4 . veṅkiyār Uḷḷiṭṭār . 3 . toṇṭaimāṉkaḷ . 3 . Iruṅkaṇūr kiḻavar . 4 . kumārat kaḷ . 4 . kaikkoḷar . 1 . ḷ kāval perumāḷ ṉāyakkar . 1 . Ūrkaṇakku . 1 . Ūṟpotu ciṟappu . 2 . Āka ṉāḷ . 3 10 . kku ciṟappu muppatukku mārkaḻi mātam cā
kaṇam puṇṇiyakālattile tiruviṟkolicuvaraṉ caṉṉatiyile Ivvaṉaivarum kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭom yinta taṉmam cantirātittavaraiyum cantāṉa paramparaiyāka naṭattivarak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Inta taṟmattukku Ār Akitam niṉaittālum Akitam niṉaitta per keṅkaik karaiyile kārām pacuvaik koṉṟa toṣattile pokakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku Eḻutiṉamaikku
piramārāyar tiruppiccarār ṉāyiṉāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.351 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
